articles.title: TON blockchain experiences another network outage
articles.description: TON blockchain has hit another network downtime, less than 24 hours after an extended halt. According to TON, congestion related to DOGS airdrop is the main reason. The Open Network (TON) blockchain has experienced another halt in block production. Reports of the outage come less than 24 hours after TON returned online following more than […]

articles.title: Telegram-Linked TON Blockchain Suffers Second Outage
articles.description: Once again, the DOGS token is gumming up the works.

articles.title: Telegram-Linked TON Blockchain Down Again as Devs Blame DOGS Meme Coin Surge
articles.description: The Open Network blockchain associated with Telegram has gone down for the second time in 24 hours thanks to the meme coin mania around DOGS.

articles.title: BlackRock launches Ether ETF in Brazil
articles.description: The asset manager has expanded its portfolio of crypto-based products in Brazil with the debut of the recently launched iShares Ethereum Trust through a depositary receipt.

articles.title: Cardano Blockchain Heads for 'Chang Hard Fork,' Biggest Upgrade in Two Years
articles.description: The main feature of the upgrade is to give Cardano the ability to introduce on-chain governance features.

articles.title: Starknet introduces parallel execution for transactions in latest upgrade
articles.description: Starknet has introduced a mechanism called parallel execution to execute multiple transactions simultaneously on its Layer 2 chain.

articles.title: TON Blockchain Resumes Operation after Three-Hour of No Block Production
articles.description: Coinspeaker TON Blockchain Resumes Operation after Three-Hour of No Block Production To resolve the problem, the TON Foundation initiated a coordinated effort to restore normalcy. Validators were instructed to restart their systems at 4:00 am UTC on August 28, in order to reestablish consensus. TON Blockchain Resumes Operation after Three-Hour of No Block Production

articles.title: TON Blockchain Recovers After Six-Hour Outage Amid DOGS Meme Coin Frenzy
articles.description: The Open Network resumed block production after hours of downtime caused by heavy trading activity of the new meme coin DOGS.

articles.title: TON Blockchain Outage Sparks Concerns Over Stability
articles.description: TON Blockchain experienced a major outage, halting block production for over seven hours and raising serious concerns about its network stability.

articles.title: Soneium and Sony Partner to Bring Blockchain Mainstream
articles.description: Soneium, a new Ethereum rollup backed by Sony and Startale Labs, aims to make blockchain technology mainstream with a focus on user-friendly adoption.

articles.title: Crypto Rollercoaster: Bitcoin’s $4,000 Price Dive Puzzles ETF Experts
articles.description: Crypto markets are in meltdown mode again as Bitcoin tanks $4,000 in a matter of hours leaving analysts asking where to next.

articles.title: TON blockchain has been down for over six hours now
articles.description: The Open Network (TON) has been experiencing an outage, with no transactions being processed for over six hours.
